issues.sample: Both door hinges that support the dihedral doors have numerous fractures. If one of the hinges is to fully fail, the door would fall on the person, critically injuring or killing them. The manufacturer denied replacing the door hinges with the revised versions that are not prone

narrative.headline: What 2019 Mclaren 570s owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 1 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Structure (100% of reports).

issues.sample: Both door hinges that support the dihedral doors have numerous fractures. If one of the hinges is to fully fail, the door would fall on the person, critically injuring or killing them. The manufacturer denied replacing the door hinges with the revised versions that are not prone
issues.title: Structure
